studies.title: The Framing of Decisions and the Psychology of Choice

cognitive_psychology.description: Studies of mental processes including attention, memory, perception, and decision-making

social_psychology.description: Studies of how people's thoughts, feelings, and behaviors are influenced by others

developmental_psychology.description: Studies of psychological development across the lifespan

behavioral_economics.description: Studies combining psychology and economics to understand economic decision-making

neuroscience.description: Studies of brain and nervous system function underlying behavior

easy.description: Simple designs with clear-cut effects and standard measures

medium.description: Within-subjects or mixed designs with moderate complexity

hard.description: Complex factorial designs with subtle effects
